topics.title: Media Executives and Television Programming
topics.summary: The studio discusses the perceived failures of CBS executive Leslie Moonves, the hiring of Katie Couric, and the complexities of corporate leadership in radio and television.

topics.title: Superhero Movies and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various superhero films, celebrity divorce news, and a list of notable actresses while addressing listener feedback regarding a move to Sirius.

topics.title: Radio Show Transitions and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the transition to satellite radio, discusses a missing segment from a David Letterman appearance, debates American Idol contestants, and shares humorous anecdotes regarding Jewish traditions.

topics.title: Mr. T Collection and Domain Names
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses his extensive collection of Mr. T memorabilia, including paintings and dolls, while the host shares stories about acquiring various domain names.

topics.title: Mr. T Memorabilia and Family Health Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses his extensive collection of Mr. T memorabilia and the collaborative efforts with another collector, followed by a discussion regarding personal family health issues involving pneumonia.

topics.title: Film Festival Planning and Radio Call Segments
topics.summary: The studio features a series of listener interactions including an aggressive caller from New Jersey, a truck driver in New Hampshire, and internal discussions regarding the logistics and musical lineup for an upcoming film festival.

topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival Planning
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics, judging lineup, and production details for an upcoming film festival featuring various entries including a tribute to Gary Coleman.

topics.title: Promotion of Meat and Vegetables Film
topics.summary: The studio promotes an upcoming film titled "Robin's Nervous Meat and Vegetables" featuring various cast members in roles as different types of food.

topics.title: Celebrity Scandals and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the legal troubles of baseball player Doc Gooden, a caller's inquiry regarding spiritual symbols, a gruesome murder in Brooklyn, and the personal lives of public figures like Roddy and Liberace.

topics.title: Blue Iris Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts Blue Iris, an adult film actress and self-described comedian, to discuss her career in the industry, her medical history involving internal bleeding, and her experiences with various filming scenarios.

topics.title: Iris Rides the Sibian
topics.summary: The studio features a guest named Iris who performs on the Sibian while discussing her website and upcoming stand-up comedy appearances.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment with Blue Iris
topics.summary: The show features a segment with guest Blue Iris, who discusses her upcoming projects and experiences while the hosts interact with callers and discuss television ratings.

topics.title: Radio Show Wrap-Up and Segment Planning
topics.summary: The studio prepares for the wrap-up show by discussing upcoming segments, including a review of celebrity appearances, a discussion on lost endorsements, and a critique of Kevin Federline's music.

topics.title: Guest List and Party Planning
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of an upcoming party, debating which guests to invite and how to manage certain personalities.

topics.title: Billy Joel Lyric Analysis
topics.summary: The studio examines a specific lyric from a Billy Joel song to determine if it contains a racial slur.

topics.title: Studio Equipment and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses technical issues with a new microphone, critiques of various media personalities, and reports on recent news stories.

topics.title: Internal Office Dynamics and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal workplace matters regarding a former intern, various entertainment news stories including celebrity appearances and reality television, and reports on local sports scandals and legal proceedings.
